creator: mickael.maillot@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 155424
kodi diff 14.0 to 14.2

Juste the update to kodi 14.2

option xrandr removed (not supported in upstream) see bug 198286
option nfs added (reported by dave at dgmm dot net)

poudriere logs:
10.1-RELEASE x86  http://fneufn.eu/freebsd/xbmc/kodi-14.2_10_x86.log
9.3-RELEASE amd64 http://fneufn.eu/freebsd/xbmc/kodi-14.2_9_x64.log

tested on my personal hardware on 9-STABLE amd64 and 10-STABLE amd64.

Notice: i need to fetch 2 files from github because source can't be fetch on kodi's official mirror anymore,
and i can find a better way to do it.
